# openwrt-docs4ai — condensed OpenWrt documentation

> Generated: 2026-03-06 08:48 UTC

This repository provides LLM-optimized documentation scraped from
multiple upstream OpenWrt sources. Two consumption modes:

1. **Complete references** — single files containing all docs per source
2. **Individual files** — per-module/per-page markdown files

---

## Complete Reference Files

- [ucode-complete-reference.md](/ucode-complete-reference.md): ucode Documentation (9211 lines, 348 KB) — commit: e87be9d
  - ⚡ [ucode-skeleton.md](/ucode-skeleton.md) (Skeleton/Headers Version — 407 lines, 15 KB)
- [luci-jsapi-complete-reference.md](/luci-jsapi-complete-reference.md): LuCI JS API Documentation (1817 lines, 72 KB) — commit: de553f3
  - ⚡ [luci-jsapi-skeleton.md](/luci-jsapi-skeleton.md) (Skeleton/Headers Version — 160 lines, 5 KB)
- [openwrt-wiki-complete-reference.md](/openwrt-wiki-complete-reference.md): OpenWrt Wiki Developer Docs (15273 lines, 855 KB)
  - ⚡ [openwrt-wiki-skeleton.md](/openwrt-wiki-skeleton.md) (Skeleton/Headers Version — 1194 lines, 27 KB)
- [openwrt-buildroot-complete-reference.md](/openwrt-buildroot-complete-reference.md): OpenWrt Buildroot Packages (2802 lines, 67 KB) — commit: 6c7dd69
  - ⚡ [openwrt-buildroot-skeleton.md](/openwrt-buildroot-skeleton.md) (Skeleton/Headers Version — 263 lines, 4 KB)
- [openwrt-examples-complete-reference.md](/openwrt-examples-complete-reference.md): LuCI Application Examples (11270 lines, 351 KB) — commit: de553f3

## Documentation Directories

- [ucode-docs/llms.txt](/ucode-docs/llms.txt): ucode Documentation index (14 files)
- [luci-docs/llms.txt](/luci-docs/llms.txt): LuCI JS API Documentation index (10 files)
- [openwrt-wiki-docs/llms.txt](/openwrt-wiki-docs/llms.txt): OpenWrt Wiki Developer Docs index (90 files)
- [openwrt-buildroot-docs/llms.txt](/openwrt-buildroot-docs/llms.txt): OpenWrt Buildroot Packages index (7 files)
- [openwrt-examples/llms.txt](/openwrt-examples/llms.txt): LuCI Application Examples index (27 files)

## Metadata

- [CHANGES.md](/CHANGES.md): What changed since last update
- Source: https://github.com/jow-/ucode, https://github.com/openwrt/luci, https://openwrt.org/docs/, https://github.com/openwrt/openwrt, https://github.com/openwrt/luci
